mapper.sql: A.SSAID, A.SNETNAME, A.SORGNAME, A.SADDR , A.SADDR_DETAIL, A.SZIPCODE, A.SEORGNAME, A.SEADDR , A.SEADDR_DETAIL, A.SADM_NAME, A.SADM_ORGNAME, A.SADM_ADDR , A.SADM_ADDR_DETAIL, A.SADM_ZIPCODE, A.SADM_ENAME, A.SADM_EORGNAME , A.SADM_EADDR, A.SADM_EADDR_DETAIL, A.SADM_PHONE, A.SADM_DPPHONE , A.SADM_FAX, A.SADM_EMAIL, A.SFLAG, A.SADDRSEQ , A.SSERIALNO, A.SADM_SERIALNO, A.SCITY, A.SECITY , A.SORGTYPE, A.SCUSTNAME, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS_USER A
